scene.summary: The old road bends through blasted scrub and broken stones, where a weathered milestone leans above a ditch filled with black rainwater. Carrion birds stir when the wind shifts.
visible_facts: A dead courier lies half-hidden in the ditch.
Fresh bootprints and claw marks cross the road.
The dead courier has belongings that include a satchel, a partially burnt letter, and a small dagger.
The dead courier's satchel is slightly ajar, hinting at the contents within.
The scavenger bandit positions himself strategically near the roadside, watching.
The scavenger bandit is positioned near the weathered milestone, observing Galinor with keen interest.
The scavenger bandit appears more relaxed, revealing a deep-seated confidence.
A partially burnt letter flutters in the breeze, its edges charred but some text is still legible.
Fresh bootprints and claw marks indicate a struggle took place recently.
discoverable_clues: The letter hints at treachery and warnings, but the details are hard to read.
The dagger shows wear but has not yet been drawn.
Galinor can examine the dead courier's belongings for more information.
The dead courier's belongings include a partially burnt letter, hinting at urgent matters.
The bandit seems prepped for an opportunity.
The dagger at the courier's side looks worn but hasn't been drawn recently.
The dead courier's belongings include a satchel, a partially burnt letter, and a small dagger.
The partially burnt letter hints at urgent matters but is difficult to read.
The bootprints appear to lead deeper into the underbrush.
The claw marks could suggest involvement of a creature roaming this area.
hidden_facts: A scavenger bandit is concealed behind the milestone.
